characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion, long dark hair. She has a soft, friendly face with subtle makeup.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, curious, and slightly hesitant but willing to learn.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female character, fair complexion, reddish-orange hair styled up. She has large green eyes and stylized, expressive facial features.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Can you speak English? [Can you speak English?]
Character A says: Yes [Yes]
Character B says: एक बार try करो! [Try it once!]
Character A says: Hello [Hello]
Character B says: Good, और? [Good, what else?]
Character A says: Thank you [Thank you]
Character B says: तो "मुझे माफ़ कर दो" को English में क्या कहेंगे? [Then how do you say "forgive me" in English?]
Character A says: Umm... Sorry! [Umm... Sorry!]
Character B says: बिलकुल सही! लेकिन आप ये भी कह सकते हो: I apologize [Exactly right! But you can also say: I apologize]
Character A says: I apologize [I apologize]
Character B says: Okay, आपका English level beginner है। [Okay, your English level is beginner.]
Character A says: मैं English movies बहुत देखती हूँ, पर मेरी speaking improve नहीं हो रही... [I watch a lot of English movies, but my speaking isn't improving...]
Character B says: टेंशन मत लो, मेरे साथ conversation practice करो। [Don't worry, practice conversation with me.]
Character A says: हैं?? तुम्हारे साथ? [Huh?? With you?]
Character B says: मैं Supernova की AI English tutor हूँ! रोज़ practice करेंगे तो आप confidently English बोलने लगोगे! [I am Supernova's AI English tutor! If we practice daily, you'll start speaking English confidently!]
Character A says: पर AI के साथ... मुझे थोड़ा अजीब लग रहा है। [But with AI... I feel a bit weird.]
Character B says: अरे, आजकल AI से सीखना सबसे smart तरीका है! कोई judge नहीं करेगा। [Hey, learning with AI is the smartest way these days! No one will judge you.]
Character A says: ऐसा है क्या...? ठीक है, try करते हैं! [Is that so...? Okay, let's try it!]
Character B says: Great! तो चलो, सबसे पहले एक professional greeting से शुरू करते हैं। मेरे पीछे बोलो: Nice to meet you [Great! So come on, let's start with a professional greeting first. Repeat after me: Nice to meet you]
Character A says: Nice to meet you [Nice to meet you]
Character B says: बहुत बढ़िया!! आज ही Supernova app download करो! [Very good!! Download the Supernova app today!]
Character A says: Done~ मिलते हैं Supernova पर! [Done~ See you on Supernova!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the user with a quick, interactive language test.
- Identifies the common problem: passive consumption (watching movies) doesn't lead to speaking fluency.
- Introduces the AI tutor as a non-judgmental, practical solution for daily practice.
- Ends with a clear call to action to download the app.

Hello.

Thank you.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Displays the brand logo and app store badges.
- Provides a clear final visual cue for the user to download the app.
